pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent from 2.6.2 to 3.3.4 to support Java 21 and modern Spring ecosystem.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x does not support Java 21; upgrading to 3.x is required for JDK 21 compatibility.

pom.xml.general_idea: Set the target Java version property to 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Maven compiler plugin needs to target Java 21 to compile code using Java 21 features or run on JDK 21.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace deprecated springfox dependencies with springdoc-openapi for Spring Boot 3 compatibility.
pom.xml.why_exists: Springfox is incompatible with Spring Boot 3 (Jakarta EE namespace changes); springdoc is the required replacement.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add explicit dependency for javax.validation API to replace implicit transitive dependency removed in Spring Boot 3.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3 moves to Jakarta EE; javax.validation classes are no longer available by default, causing compile errors if referenced.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade spring-cloud-gateway-mvc to version 4.1.3 compatible with Spring Boot 3.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Cloud 2021.x (compatible with Boot 2.6) is incompatible with Spring Boot 3; requires Spring Cloud 2023.x (4.x).

Dockerfile.general_idea: Switch the base image from a Maven-bundled JDK 11 image to a standalone Liberica JDK 21 Alpine image to support Java 21.
Dockerfile.why_exists: The application code has been migrated to Java 21; running it on JDK 11 results in runtime errors due to missing APIs or bytecode incompatibility.

Dockerfile.general_idea: Replace apt-get with apk to align with the new Alpine Linux base image.
Dockerfile.why_exists: Alpine Linux uses apk, not apt-get; using apt-get causes a command not found error during build.

Dockerfile.general_idea: Explicitly install Maven via apk since the new base image does not include it.
Dockerfile.why_exists: The build step requires mvn to compile the project; without this installation, the build fails with 'command not found'.

Dockerfile.general_idea: Install libstdc++ to satisfy native library dependencies required by the application or its dependencies on Alpine.
Dockerfile.why_exists: Missing native libraries cause UnsatisfiedLinkError or similar runtime failures when the application starts.

Dockerfile.general_idea: Install git to support build-time operations that require version control information.
Dockerfile.why_exists: Build plugins or scripts may fail if git is not available to read repository metadata.

Dockerfile.general_idea: Change the container entrypoint from a generic bash shell to executing the compiled Java JAR file.
Dockerfile.why_exists: The container must run the application; starting a bash shell does not launch the service, causing the app to be unreachable.

frontend/package.json.general_idea: Enforce Node.js v20.17.0 to align with the backend Java 21 migration and modern frontend tooling requirements.
frontend/package.json.why_exists: Without this, the project may run on incompatible Node versions (e.g., Node 14/16) that lack support for modern ESM features or dependencies required by React 18/Storybook 8, leading to runtime crashes or build failures.

frontend/package.json.general_idea: Migrate React and ReactDOM from version 17 to 18 to support modern concurrency features and compatibility with newer libraries.
frontend/package.json.why_exists: React 18 introduces a new root API (`createRoot`) and changes to batching; code relying on `ReactDOM.render` will fail at runtime, and many modern UI libraries (like Storybook 8) require React 18+.

frontend/package.json.general_idea: Update Create React App's react-scripts from v4 to v5 to support React 18 and modern Webpack 5 features.
frontend/package.json.why_exists: react-scripts v4 does not support React 18's new root API and uses Webpack 4, which is incompatible with many modern dependencies and Node 20.

frontend/package.json.general_idea: Migrate Storybook from v6 to v8 to align with React 18 and modern development workflows.
frontend/package.json.why_exists: Storybook v6 is incompatible with React 18 and Node 20; attempting to run it will result in build errors or runtime crashes due to deprecated APIs and dependency conflicts.

frontend/package.json.general_idea: Update npm scripts to use Storybook 8 CLI commands (`storybook dev`/`build`) instead of v6 commands (`start-storybook`/`build-storybook`).
frontend/package.json.why_exists: The `start-storybook` command was removed in Storybook 7/8; using it will cause a 'command not found' or module resolution error.

frontend/package.json.general_idea: Configure Jest to map axios to its CommonJS build to resolve ESM/CJS interop issues in testing.
frontend/package.json.why_exists: Axios v1+ is ESM-first; without this mapping, Jest (which runs in CJS mode by default in CRA) will fail to import axios, causing test suite crashes.

frontend/package.json.general_idea: Override react-refresh version to 0.14.2 to resolve compatibility issues with React 18 and Webpack 5.
frontend/package.json.why_exists: Without this override, transitive dependencies may pull in an incompatible version of react-refresh, causing hot-reload failures or build errors in React 18.
